testcase.name: test_privacy_flags_hide_sections_from_stranger

failure.message: sqlalchemy.exc.StatementError: (builtins.AttributeError) 'str' object has no attribute 'hex' [SQL: SELECT profiles.id, profiles.user_id, profiles.tenant_id, profiles.gender, profiles.date_of_birth, profiles.time_of_birth, profiles.height_cm, profiles.weight_kg, profiles.complexion, profiles.blood_group, profiles.marital_status, profiles.disabilities, profiles.religion, profiles.caste, profiles.sub_caste, profiles.gotra, profiles.mother_tongue, profiles.birth_place, profiles.rashi, profiles.star, profiles.dhosam, profiles.manglik, profiles.qualification, profiles.profession, profiles.working_at, profiles.income_range, profiles.city, profiles.state, profiles.country, profiles.native_place, profiles.current_location, profiles.father_name, profiles.father_occupation, profiles.mother_name, profiles.mother_occupation, profiles.siblings_details, profiles.mobile, profiles.whatsapp, profiles.photo_keys, profiles.horoscope_key, profiles.personal_visible, profiles.photo_visible, profiles.birth_visible, profiles.professional_visible, profiles.family_visible, profiles.contact_visible, profiles.horoscope_visible, profiles.status, profiles.created_at, profiles.updated_at FROM profiles WHERE profiles.id = ?] [parameters: [{}]]
